subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Thy letter was received. Thou didst complain that your Assembly is sore perturbed… Hath the Blessed Beauty instituted this Covenant and Testament in order to exact obedience from all
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا نامه ات رسید شکایت از محفلتان نموده بودی که در اضطراب است هر مرضی
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
